backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor defining e-commerce types (Product, Order, UserProfile) and implementing CRUD operations for products, orders, and user profiles with role-based access control (admin/user permissions) and blob storage integration.
feature_evidence.json: Empty feature evidence report JSON file with no features listed.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Text file containing JSON-formatted summaries of all frontend components, pages, hooks, and contexts describing their functionality and responsibilities.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom CSS variables for light and dark theme colors, including design tokens for backgrounds, borders, charts, and sidebar components.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point with meta tags for SEO, favicon, and root div for React app mounting with StudyNeeds branding.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component configuring TanStack Router with all application routes (home, shop, product details, cart, checkout, admin) and wrapping with CartProvider, WishlistProvider, and ProfileSetupModal logic.
frontend/src/components/admin/OrderDetai: Modal dialog for viewing and updating order details including customer info, delivery address, order items, and status with admin controls for status changes.
frontend/src/components/admin/OrdersMana: Admin dashboard component for managing orders with filtering by status, displaying order list in a table, and showing total revenue statistics.
frontend/src/components/admin/ProductFor: Modal form for adding or editing products with fields for name, category, price, discount, stock, description, and image upload with preview functionality.
frontend/src/components/admin/ProductsMa: Admin dashboard component for managing products with search, category filtering, and CRUD operations (add, edit, delete) displayed in a table format.
frontend/src/components/admin/UserDetail: Modal component displaying detailed user information including profile data, order statistics, and complete order history with status badges and formatted dates.
frontend/src/components/admin/UsersManag: Admin dashboard component for managing users with search functionality, displaying user list in a table with registration dates, order counts, and view details actions.
frontend/src/components/AdminRoute.tsx: Protected route component that verifies user authentication and admin status, showing loading states and unauthorized messages before redirecting non-admin users to homepage.
frontend/src/components/BannerSlider.tsx: Auto-rotating carousel component displaying 5 promotional banners with manual navigation arrows, dot indicators, and 5-second auto-advance interval.
frontend/src/components/CategoriesMenu.t: Modal overlay component displaying 8 product categories in a grid with icons and links to category-specific shop pages, with close button functionality.
frontend/src/components/CategoriesSectio: Homepage section rendering 8 product categories in a responsive grid with icons, hover effects, and links to category-filtered shop pages.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Footer component with four columns (About, Policies, Contact, Newsletter), social media links, contact information, and newsletter subscription form. Includes copyright notice and displays current year dynamically.
frontend/src/components/Header.tsx: Main header component with sticky navigation, search bar, location selector, cart icon, and authentication controls. Includes mobile menu toggle, admin badge display, and Internet Identity integration for login/logout.
frontend/src/components/LocationSelector: Modal component for selecting delivery location from a grid of Indian cities. Displays as an overlay with city buttons and closes after selection.
frontend/src/components/MobileMenu.tsx: Slide-out mobile navigation menu with links to Home and Shop pages, plus authentication controls. Appears as a sidebar overlay on mobile devices.
frontend/src/components/ProductCard.tsx: Product display card showing image, name, rating, price with discount, and action buttons (Add to Cart, Buy Now, Wishlist toggle). Links to product detail page and includes hover effects.
frontend/src/components/ProductSection.t: Section wrapper that displays a title and grid of up to 8 product cards. Returns null if no products are provided.
frontend/src/components/ProfileSetupModa: Modal dialog for first-time user profile setup requiring name, email, phone, and address. Cannot be dismissed and saves profile data via mutation hook.
Displays four service cards (E-Commerce, Home Tuition, Documentation, Career Counselling) in a grid layout. Only E-Commerce is currently available; others show 'Coming Soon' badges.
frontend/src/components/TestimonialsSect: Displays a carousel of customer testimonials with navigation controls, showing ratings, quotes, and customer details on a gradient blue background.
frontend/src/components/WhatsAppButton.t: Renders a fixed floating WhatsApp button in the bottom-right corner that opens a chat with a predefined phone number and message.
frontend/src/components/WhyChooseSection: Displays a grid of five feature cards highlighting platform benefits like trusted platform, affordable pricing, local support, verified teachers, and fast delivery.
frontend/src/context/CartContext.tsx: React context providing shopping cart functionality with localStorage persistence, including add/update/remove items, quantity management, and price calculations with discount support.
frontend/src/context/WishlistContext.tsx: React context managing user wishlist with localStorage persistence, providing methods to add, remove, check existence, and retrieve wishlist product IDs.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook managing backend actor creation with Internet Identity authentication, handling admin token initialization and automatic query invalidation on identity changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useGetCallerUserProfi: React Query hook fetching the current authenticated user's profile from the backend actor with loading and error states.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Context provider and hook for Internet Identity authentication, managing login/logout flow, identity state, and AuthClient configuration with delegation validation.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Collection of React Query hooks for products, orders, user profiles, and admin operations including queries (get products/orders/users) and mutations (place order, save profile, manage products/orders).
frontend/src/hooks/useWishlist.ts: Simple re-export hook providing access to the WishlistContext functionality.
frontend/src/index.css: Global CSS file that imports Poppins font and Tailwind directives, defines CSS custom properties for light/dark theme colors including StudyNeeds brand colors (blue primary and orange accent).
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that renders the root React component with QueryClientProvider for React Query and InternetIdentityProvider for authentication context.
frontend/src/pages/AdminDashboardPage.ts: Admin dashboard page with tabs for managing products, orders, and users, displaying summary cards for total products, orders, pending orders, and revenue statistics.
frontend/src/pages/CartPage.tsx: Shopping cart page that displays cart items with quantity controls, calculates totals including delivery charges, and provides navigation to checkout or back to shopping.
frontend/src/pages/CheckoutPage.tsx: Checkout page with a form for delivery address and payment method selection (online/COD), validates user authentication, and submits order with cart items.
frontend/src/pages/HomePage.tsx: Main landing page displaying banner slider, categories, and multiple product sections (trending, school essentials, budget deals, furniture) along with services, testimonials, and why-choose sections.
frontend/src/pages/OrderConfirmationPage: Order confirmation page showing success message with checkmark icon, estimated delivery time (3-5 business days), and button to continue shopping.
frontend/src/pages/ProductDetailsPage.ts: Product detail page displaying product images with thumbnail selector, pricing with discounts, quantity controls, add-to-cart and buy-now buttons, and related products section.
frontend/src/pages/ShopPage.tsx: Shop page component with category sidebar, product filtering, and sorting (by price/rating). Fetches products by category or all products, displays them in a grid with ProductCard components.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for extracting and managing URL parameters from both regular query strings and hash-based routing, with sessionStorage persistence support for parameters like admin tokens.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom color scheme using OKLCH, Poppins font family, extended theme tokens for UI components (sidebar, chart, card), and animation keyframes for accordions.
project_state.json: Project metadata defining StudyNeeds as a multi-service student platform with e-commerce, tuition marketplace, and documentation services. Lists architectural notes, existing features, and design specifications (blue/orange theme, Flipkart-style UI).
